query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "redesign mixture-of-experts routers with manifold power iteration" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core mechanism (Mixture-of-Experts routing) and domain (large models) as the user's question, satisfying criteria (a) and (b) by providing an alternative approach to router design that a researcher extending the "Manifold Power Iteration" work would need to cite as related work.
